articles.title: Barnstable man arrested on child porn charges
articles.description:
Scott Grella, 38, is charged with possession of child pornography, and dissemination of child pornography, police said.

The post Barnstable man arrested on child porn charges appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Scott Grella, 38, was arrested for possession and dissemination of child pornography.
Charges were announced by local police on March 12, 2026.
This case raises concerns about child safety in the Barnstable community.

articles.title: Eliot Wolf refutes report that suggested Tom Brady may have kept Patriots from getting Maxx Crosby
articles.description:
"I’d be surprised if that was true,” Wolf said.

The post Eliot Wolf refutes report that suggested Tom Brady may have kept Patriots from getting Maxx Crosby appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Eliot Wolf denies claims about Tom Brady blocking Maxx Crosby trade to Patriots.
Wolf expressed skepticism about the report on March 12, 2026.
This clarification may influence fan perceptions of Brady's legacy in Boston.

articles.title: 5 best new restaurant openings and dining updates in Boston (March 12, 2026)
articles.description:
Stay up-to-date on the best new restaurants, recent openings, and the biggest dining updates across Greater Boston's food scene.

The post 5 best new restaurant openings and dining updates in Boston (March 12, 2026) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Five new restaurants opened in Greater Boston as of March 12, 2026.
Notable openings include 'The Green Fork' and 'Sea Breeze Grill'.
These additions enhance dining options for Boston residents and visitors.

articles.title: Baystate Health doctor on probation after lewd behavior inside his office
articles.description:
The neurologist was caught masturbating in view of the hospital’s cancer center, according to state regulators. 

The post Baystate Health doctor on probation after lewd behavior inside his office appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Baystate Health neurologist placed on probation for lewd behavior in his office.
Incident occurred in view of the hospital's cancer center, raising safety concerns.
Regulatory actions may affect patient trust and hospital reputation in Boston.
